author: nflaig
content:
<@&1417820113981145228> we wanna merge https://github.com/ethereum/beacon-APIs/pull/608 soon, last chance to raise complaints

I also wanna point out this note on `prepareBeaconCommitteeSubnet`
>     Beacon nodes SHOULD use the set of validators that have submitted subscriptions via this
>     endpoint to determine which validators are using the node for duties and to calculate the
>     node's required custody group count (CGC). Validator clients SHOULD submit one entry per
>     attached active validator per attestation duty, including when multiple validators share
>     the same `(slot, committee_index)`, so the beacon node tracks every attached validator
>     rather than only one per subnet.

right now, only Nimbus uses `prepareBeaconCommitteeSubnet` to track validators attached and determine their custody requirements (cgc) but all clients ideally should switch to this already before the gloas fork
